pages.text: A defensive spellstone that turns the bearer into something closer to an iron golem.$(br2)It grants armor, toughness, knockback resistance, and special protection when the bearer wears no armor.
pages.title: Heart of the Golem

pages.text: Its strength has a price.$(br2)Magic, poison, wither, and similar effects become more dangerous while this stone is worn.
pages.title: Weakness
